title: orchis × colemanii
intro: Orchis × colemanii, a hybrid orchid plant, is a rare and endangered species resulting from the cross between the Orchis italica and Orchis mascula. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits including antioxidant, anti-asthmatic, and anti-allergic effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
